positive: Highly detailed, symmetrical mandala pattern featuring stylized forest flora and abstract geometric linework. The primary elements include delicate fern fronds, interlocking crescent moons, stylized oak leaves, and continuous vine patterns, rendered in deep emerald green, muted gold, and stark black. The style should be intricate sacred geometry mixed with modern botanical art, featuring sharp, clean silhouettes against a bright negative space background. Central composition, perfect for repeat print application, emphasizing strong contrast and visual rhythm. Minimalist aesthetic, intricate etching style, vector art quality, high contrast ink drawing, suitable for apparel screen printing.
